items.title: Confident Bangladesh pose Australia a fresh challenge after 15-year wait for an ODI series
items.summary: While spin dominated in Pakistan, Australia could find pace playing more of a role this series
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: IND vs AFG one-off Test: Manav Suthar takes 6/33 on debut as India enforces follow-on against Afghanistan
items.summary: Afghanistan needed a substantial partnership, but Suthar’s ability to extract turn from the surface ensured India tighten their grip
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
